content: Julienne Lylvieve: Ugh, these damned Legion soldiers left grease all over the place again. One of those Imperial bastards tried to grab my ass yesterday. I swear, if he comes back, I’ll stick this dagger where the sun don't shine. Lydia: Ha! You Breton girls are too soft. Back in Whiterun, I split an Imperial officer's skull in two for looking at my Thane wrong. The bitch had it comin’—filthy Empire-lovers, all of ‘em. Julienne Lylvieve: Well, I—I mean, I ain’t weak! My pa taught me to fight, but… gods, I wish I had your confidence. Sometimes I just freeze up when they get handsy. Lydia: Confidence comes when you know you can gut a man like a fish before he even gets his cock hard. Or… maybe after. Either way, you oughta practice—bet some bandit cunts would make good practice dummies ‘fore MJR and I put ‘em down for good. Julienne Lylvieve: You really love him, huh? The way you talk about him… Lydia: Fuck yeah, I do. His hands, his cock, the way he makes me scream when he bends me over a ruin wall… And I’ll cut the tits off any slut who tries to steal him. Even that undead fuck Serana—though she’s fun for a threesome. Julienne Lylvieve: Saints… I-I ain’t had… that. Lydia: No man brave enough to take you, little girl? Or scared your pa’ll gut ‘em like a pig? Julienne Lylvieve: Shut up! It ain’t like that… I just… Ain’t nobody around here worth it.

Lydia: Hah! Then you ain’t lookin’ hard enough. Plenty of decent Nord boys out there who’d be happy to break in a tight Breton cunt like yours. Just stay clear of them milk-drinking Imperials—they ain’t got the stamina for a real woman. Julienne Lylvieve: I—ugh, whatever. Maybe when this damned war’s over, I’ll find someone not too scared of my pa’s axe. Til then, I got dishes to scrape and floors to mop. Lydia: That’s the spirit. Just don’t turn into some prissy tavern wench. Dibella made us for more than scrubbing tankards—like worship, war, and wild fucking. And if you ever change your mind, MJR might be… generous. Julienne Lylvieve: Oh, fuck off!

(Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): MJR is in a spacious room, featuring wooden walls and a high, vaulted ceiling with a loft area. The room is dimly lit, with natural light entering through rows of small windows along the upper part of the walls, allowing MJR to observe all visible objects. The floor is primarily made of stone, but in the center of the room, a large animal hide is laid out.)

(Visual context as seen by MJR (the player) at the start of the conversation: MJR is in a spacious room, featuring wooden walls and a high, vaulted ceiling with a loft area. The room is dimly lit, with natural light entering through rows of small windows along the upper part of the walls, allowing MJR to observe all visible objects. The floor is primarily made of stone, but in the center of the room, a large animal hide is laid out.)

Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Lydia: By Dibella's perfect tits, this place stinks of Imperial cowardice and weak mead. I'd rather be knee-deep in Falmer guts than listen to another milk-drinker praise Talos. Julienne Lylvieve: Hey now, my father worshipped Talos before... before the damn Thalmor had him whipped for it. Say what you will about the Empire, but at least they never tried to choke me with their cock like some Stormcloak bastards did.

(Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The person viewing this scene appears to be looking at two women in a large, dimly lit wooden room with a high ceiling. The woman closest to the viewer has long white hair and is wearing a black band around each upper arm. She is facing away from the viewer, and her back is bare. In front of her, on the left side of the scene, there is a fire burning in a pit or hearth.)

Lydia: Hah! If a true Nord warrior tried to take you, you'd be thanking Talos yourself by the third thrust. These Imperial fucks wouldn't know real passion if it bit them in their limp cocks. Julienne Lylvieve: Maybe I prefer my men to actually ask before shoving it in! Not that you'd understand, chasing after your Dragonborn like a bitch in heat. Saw you eyeing that bear hide - planning to ride it like you ride him? Lydia: You little Breton slut! At least I don't fuck lumber thieves behind the mill like some tavern wench.

(Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): MJR is standing in a large, dimly lit room with a high, vaulted ceiling. The walls and ceiling are made of wood, and the floor is covered in a patterned rug. A large fire pit sits in the center of the room, emitting a warm glow and smoke that rises towards the ceiling.)
